docket_entries.description: HEARING ON APPLICANT/BRIAN FLOYD EDEN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. BRIAN FLOYD EDEN HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER EDEN, BRIAN FLOYD HEARING SET FOR DEC-06-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218

PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER EDEN, BRIAN FLOYD JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PETITIONER EDEN, BRIAN FLOYD
FEES NOT PAID. PETITION OF BRIAN FLOYD EDEN FILED ON 9/21/07 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER EDEN, BRIAN FLOYD

UNCONTESTED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OF DEC-06-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 218 IS OFF CALENDAR - THE PETITION WAS STRIKEN ON 10/26/07. JUDGE OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE, CLERK: SAJJA RAVINANTAPRICHA & CARLA AMADOR, NOT REPORTED (DEPARTMENT 218).
